purpose: Rank work items for a future Custom Tools & Workflow Products service page. Does not change /work index or work-data.

proofReadinessForFirstRuntimePage.assessment: Primary + supporting pair (Growth Engine + Barbershop Command Center) already carry production tool/workflow-product narratives with metrics. No requirement to wait on additional /work entries before first ship.
proofReadinessForFirstRuntimePage.optionalThirdLater: the-launchpad — only if the page needs a third card without bloating the Graston micro-tool list.

notCandidatesForThisServiceLine.topic: Personal / non-client builds (e.g. PRO DJ Studio, Strum AI)
notCandidatesForThisServiceLine.reason: Per CLAUDE.md Phase 3D — removed from public tool surface; not client proof for a demand-gen service line.

notCandidatesForThisServiceLine.topic: Identity- or studio-first case studies without a centered tool narrative
notCandidatesForThisServiceLine.reason: Portfolio expansion for this offer risks generic app positioning; only add work when the case study clearly supports tools/workflow products.

primaryProof.why: Production two-sided product: search, admin/staff surfaces, AI-assisted support, dashboards — strongest single artifact for custom tool + workflow product framing.

supportingProof.why: Operational dual-sided UI (booking, rules, visibility) that illustrates workflow product without competing with Growth Engine as the hero metric story.

secondaryMechanismOnly.note: Strong lifecycle/automation story; use as third proof only if page needs range — otherwise keep under Graston parent narrative.

outOfScopeForNow.reason: Supporting Graston system detail; not a standalone buyer-facing proof line for this offer unless case study is expanded.
Same — embedded in Graston arc; avoid portfolio sprawl.
Lives on /tools as self-serve lead utility; not client proof for this service line.

explicitNonCandidates: Personal or non-client builds (per CLAUDE.md Phase 3D removals)
Any work item without a clear client + outcome narrative
